releaseNotes: Three fixes from the v2.16.16 stress test. Audio event play buttons now appear automatically after the sleep audio worker syncs (the v2.16.16 attempt fired at the wrong worker step; this version observes the per-record Room Flow so the UI updates whenever any worker step writes). Phone-pickup timestamps now show in past records even after an offline save — pickups are persisted to a new local table and the UI reads from Room first, with the backend acting as a refresh. Rotating the device on the Sleep tab no longer dumps you back to Dashboard — MainActivity now handles orientation + related config changes itself instead of letting Android destroy the Activity.
